settled_basis.note: Settlement-derived (total_net_gbp). Diverges from the bill-derived ledger view (financial.ledger.net_margin_gbp) -- see the reconciliation bridge.

reconciliation.dominant_item_label: Non-commodity cost absorbed with no revenue recognition (root cause, dominant item)
reconciliation.note: VAT is excluded from both sides (settlement never models VAT; the ledger subtracts vat_remittance_gbp from total_billed_gbp) -- checked, not a reconciling item. Bad debt (write-offs) is tracked separately on both sides and does not enter either net_margin_gbp figure -- checked, not a reconciling item for THIS bridge.

enterprise_value_basis.note: Derived from the settled-clock net margin above -- inherits its divergence from the bill-derived view until the bridge is applied to recompute it.

passport.rule: R14 -- every financial figure carries its clock (settled/billed/banked)

passport.note: Hedge fraction is the share of forecast volume forward-bought; basis-risk error is the company's own curve vs the sim's ground truth (the company never reads sim internals -- epistemic wall).

stages.note: Debt written off -- bad debt provision raised
Debt placed with third-party debt collection agency
DCA recovered GBP11.32 net of commission (20% recovery rate, 15% commission)
Debt written off -- bad debt provision raised
Debt placed with third-party debt collection agency
DCA recovered GBP15.33 net of commission (20% recovery rate, 15% commission)

passport.note: A real named account. Lifetime net is settlement-derived (settled clock); billed/banked are its own invoice-ledger cash clocks.

stress_bands.switching_insight: Financially stressed customers switch LESS, not more: friction costs (deposits, DD setup, mental load) suppress switching hardest for HIGH-stress households (x0.65) vs LOW-stress (x1.10) — a fixed function of stress, simulation/switching_propensity.py.

items.name: Billing must be accurate
items.source: Ofgem SLC 6/7
items.basis: 1 bill(s) held by the pre-bill validation gate

items.name: Back-billing cap -- cannot bill >12 months of unbilled consumption
items.source: Ofgem SLC 21BA (domestic back-billing protection; microbusiness NOT yet enforced)

items.name: Credit refunds within 10 working days of account closure
items.source: Ofgem SLC 14

items.name: Guaranteed Standards of Performance -- automatic compensation payments
items.source: Ofgem GSOP Regulations
items.basis: Tracked by company/billing (GSOP compensation physics, Phase 3 unhappy-paths)

items.name: Priority Services Register -- vulnerable customer welfare duties
items.source: Ofgem SLC 0 / Consumer Duty / PSR Code of Practice

items.name: Gas safety -- incident logging, RIDDOR-reportable events, unsafe-appliance duties
items.source: Gas Safety (Installation and Use) Regulations 1998 / Gas Safety (Management) Regulations 1996

items.name: Prepayment self-disconnection safeguards -- emergency/friendly-hours credit, vulnerability checks
items.source: Ofgem SLC 27 / SLC 28 (PPM safeguards)

items.name: Winter/vulnerable disconnection moratorium -- no disconnection of protected customers Oct-Mar
items.source: Ofgem SLC 27 (winter disconnection moratorium; Energy UK Safety Net)

items.name: Disconnection conduct -- ability-to-pay assessment, warning steps, PSR check before disconnection
items.source: Ofgem SLC 27 (disconnection conduct)

items.name: VAT must be charged at the correct rate by customer segment
items.source: VAT Act 1994 (domestic 5%, business 20%, de minimis rules)
items.basis: 1 bill(s) held by the pre-bill validation gate

items.name: Microbusiness back-billing protection (NOT yet enforced -- known gap)
items.source: Ofgem SLC 21BA extension to microbusiness customers
items.basis: No automated live check wired to this report yet

items.name: Complaints handling + Energy Ombudsman referral timescales (8-week / deadlock)
items.source: Ofgem Complaints Handling Standards / Energy Ombudsman scheme rules

items.name: Data protection -- lawful basis, breach reporting, subject rights (UK GDPR)
items.source: UK GDPR / Data Protection Act 2018

items.name: Energy theft / revenue-protection conduct -- evidence handling, safe & proportionate action
items.source: Ofgem SLC (theft) / Theft Act 1968 / revenue-protection code of practice

items.name: Settlement / industry-code duties (BSC, MRA metering data obligations)
items.source: BSC / MRA

items.name: Marketing and switching conduct rules (cooling-off, misleading claims)
items.source: Consumer Contracts Regulations 2013 / Ofgem SLC (marketing standards)

items.name: Smart meter rollout progress reporting
items.source: Ofgem SLC 22 / SLC 45

items.name: Warm Home Discount / ECO social obligation spend
items.source: WHD Scheme Regulations 2011 / ECO4 2022-2026

items.name: Green tariff REGO backing must match claimed renewable supply
items.source: Fuel Mix Disclosure Regulations 2005

items.name: Consumer Duty -- good outcomes across products, price, understanding, support
items.source: FCA-style Consumer Duty applied via Ofgem SLC 0 (2023)

items.name: Capital adequacy -- Capital Floor (positive adjusted net assets) + Capital Target (GBP115 adjusted net assets / dual-fuel customer)
items.source: Ofgem Financial Resilience programme -- Minimum Capital Requirement / Capital Target (adjusted net assets = net assets less intangibles & goodwill), under the SLC 4B Financial Responsibility Principle and the capital/ring-fencing licence conditions
items.basis: No automated live check wired to this report yet

items.name: Annual Fuel Mix Disclosure -- fuel mix of electricity supplied + CO2 intensity (g/kWh)
items.source: Electricity (Fuel Mix Disclosure) Regulations 2005 (SI 2005/391) + the electricity supply licence fuel-mix-disclosure condition (annual disclosure of the fuel mix of electricity supplied and its carbon intensity)
items.basis: No automated live check wired to this report yet

items.name: Cyber security baseline (NIS / Cyber Security & Resilience Bill direction of travel)
items.source: Network and Information Systems Regulations 2018 (SI 2018/506), under which Ofgem is the competent authority for the downstream gas & electricity sub-sector; plus the Cyber Security & Resilience Bill / DESNZ-Ofgem consultation direction of travel toward baseline cyber requirements for ALL licensees
items.basis: No automated live check wired to this report yet

passport.note: The obligations register is the company's own compliance reading of published law (regulation-commons doctrine); a real supplier can misread it and be fined -- so RED/AMBER is kept, never smoothed.
